description_long: This is a modern, cubic house surrounded by a tall wooden fence and a row of evenly spaced, slender coniferous trees. The structure features a mix of flat and partially glass roofs, with a prominent glass-enclosed section that appears to be a sunroom or greenhouse. The exterior is predominantly white with large, rectangular windows, some of which are floor-to-ceiling, providing ample natural light. There is a visible outdoor pool area and a paved courtyard, suggesting a focus on outdoor living. The house is multi-leveled, with at least two distinct stories and a rooftop area that may be accessible. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a strong emphasis on geometric forms.
description: A modern, white cubic house with large windows, a glass sunroom, flat roofs, and a fenced yard lined with tall coniferous trees.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the side, highlighting the glass sunroom, rooftop features, and the dense row of trees along the fence.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front of the house, revealing the main entry, large windows, the pool area, and the open courtyard.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear, with a focus on the pool, a large flat-roofed section, and the back garden area.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the opposite side, emphasizing the glass sunroom, the upper story, and the continuous tree line along the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, large glass door, and no visible steps or decorative columns
